_comment: REGISTRY of books on the shelf. The dashboard READS this to build its tabs/covers automatically — publishing a new comic = adding/updating an entry here, never editing the dashboard shell. Owned by dashboard/FILES.md. cover/path resolve at runtime; status drives badges and gating.

site.title: The Madrid Adventures
site.tagline: Maria, Pepe & Luna — three siblings, many worlds.

stories.title: Roman Holiday
stories.subtitle: Maria, Pepe & Luna's Roman Holiday
stories.blurb: Three siblings loose in Rome — gelato disasters, a wallet in the Trevi Fountain, and the Mouth of Truth.

stories.title: The Shadow Over the Old Castle
stories.subtitle: A magical castle adventure
stories.blurb: A cursed castle, a monster gauntlet, and Luna's very own silver fox.

stories.title: Mars
stories.subtitle: An adventure on the red planet
stories.blurb: Coming soon — the siblings blast off to Mars.
